---
title: "Guillermo A. Cruces | Research and Publications"
description: "Academic homepage for Guillermo A. Cruces with research papers, working papers, contact information, and publication links."
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell">
  <header class="site-header">
    <nav class="site-nav" aria-label="Primary navigation">
      <a href="#top">Home</a>
      <a href="#research">Research</a>
      <a href="#work">Working Papers</a>
      <a href="#policy">Policy</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <main id="top">
    <section class="hero section">
      <div class="hero-stage">
        <figure class="portrait-frame">
          <img
            src="./assets/images/guillermo-cruces.jpg"
            alt="Portrait of Guillermo Cruces"
          />
        </figure>
        <div class="hero-copy">
          <h1>Guillermo A. Cruces</h1>
          <p class="hero-summary">
            Professor of Economics at Universidad de San Andres and the University
            of Nottingham, with research spanning public economics, labor markets,
            taxation, social protection, poverty, and inequality. Hola.
          </p>
          <div class="hero-meta" aria-label="Affiliations">
            <span>Universidad de San Andres</span>
            <span>University of Nottingham</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-links-bar">
        <div id="hero-links" class="mini-link-list"></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="research" class="section">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <div>
          <p class="section-kicker">Research output</p>
          <h2>Published papers</h2>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="paper-toolbar">
        <label class="search-field">
          <span class="sr-only">Search papers</span>
          <input
            id="paper-search"
            type="search"
            placeholder="Search articles and working papers by title, authors, venue, or year"
          />
        </label>
      </div>

      <div id="paper-grid" class="paper-grid" aria-live="polite"></div>
    </section>

    <section id="work" class="section work-section">
      <div class="work-block">
        <p class="section-kicker">Working papers</p>
        <h2>Working paper archive</h2>
        <div id="working-list" class="stack-list"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="work-block">
        <p class="section-kicker">Ongoing projects</p>
        <h2>Active lines of work</h2>
        <div id="ongoing-list" class="stack-list"></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="policy" class="section">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <div>
          <p class="section-kicker">Policy and books</p>
          <h2>Policy-facing publications, reports, and chapters</h2>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="policy-grid" class="policy-grid"></div>
    </section>
  </main>

  <footer class="site-footer">
    <p><a href="mailto:gcruces@cedlas.org">gcruces@cedlas.org</a></p>
  </footer>
</div>

<script src="./script.js"></script>
```
